name: Banana-Walnut Snack Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Pour the snack cake mix into an ungreased 8 or 9 inch square baking pan.
3. In a small bowl, combine the remaining ingredients: beaten egg, vegetable oil, mashed ripe banana, buttermilk/milk/water, and chopped walnuts. Beat with a fork until well blended.
4. Stir the combined ingredients into the snack cake mix until just blended.
5. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes in the preheated oven or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool on a rack.
7. Dust cooled cake with powdered sugar and place a paper doily on top before serving.
